response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at Naver, plus strong software craftsmanship credentials (TDD, mentoring, workshops). However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI/GenAI solutions, no mention of Python (a key required language), no vector databases or RAG architectures, and limited cloud platform depth beyond AWS CDK. The AI experience appears recent (~1 year) rather than the deep AI background the Staff role demands.
strengths: Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at Naver aligns with key technologies
Strong TypeScript/Node.js depth plus proven technical leadership, mentoring, and workshop delivery experience
Track record of shipping production systems at scale (millions of requests/sec at Sociomantic, high-volume mail platform at Tencent)
concerns: No demonstrated Python experience or 8+ years of AI-driven solution development as required
Resume shows no explicit work with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/optimization
Limited evidence of designing AI systems on major cloud platforms or building customer-facing technical discovery

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI/GenAI tenure vs 8+ year requirement
MCP and agentic workflow experience at Naver
Missing Python, RAG, and vector database experience
